label: Dashboard
title: Dashboard
description: Private command, reflection, analysis, and management environment for continuity model owners.

sections.title: Model Control Center
sections.summary: Anchor the current active model, interaction route, and readiness posture from one owner-facing control surface.
items: Switch the active model and keep routing continuity stable across the platform.
Review trust posture, public state, and verification before making a model more visible.
Keep interaction entry aligned with the model’s preferred route and current readiness.

sections.title: Reflection & Thought Capture
sections.summary: Preserve structured thought capture as an owner tool rather than a generic notes surface.
items: Capture thought fragments, themes, and observations that should shape continuity over time.
Organize reflections for future dialogue, training, and longitudinal pattern review.
Prepare voice-linked submissions and source additions without fragmenting model identity.

sections.title: Analytics & Pattern Intelligence
sections.summary: Treat model analytics as an interpretive intelligence layer, not a decorative metrics board.
items: Review training status, maturity posture, and public-route readiness.
Track interaction mode distribution and current discoverability posture.
Surface pattern, reliability, and trust indicators that inform future training decisions.

sections.title: Knowledge Graph
sections.summary: Prepare the graph-linked continuity layer that connects sources, patterns, entities, and longitudinal records.
items: Link continuity records, source evidence, and future graph nodes.
Preserve visibility into model provenance and relationship structure.
Keep graph ownership modular so richer traversal can arrive without page rewrites.

sections.title: Training Status
sections.summary: Keep training orchestration visible across voice, response-style, thought-pattern, and public-readiness preparation.

sections.title: Source & Linked Accounts
sections.summary: Keep external-account authorization, source provenance, and identity proof in one governed section.

sections.title: Runtime / Health / System Status
sections.summary: Maintain a clean system-governance surface for runtime status, route integrity, and operational readiness.

sections.title: Private Archive / History
sections.summary: Preserve private archive review separately from the public continuity-history surface.

sections.title: Settings Shortcuts
sections.summary: Keep settings access short and subordinate to the dashboard’s primary intelligence role.
